name: NEW_ENTRANTS_2024
description: New entrants in 2024. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (a:Assignee)<-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]-(p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
WITH a, min(y.year) AS first_year, count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN y.year = $year THEN p END) AS patent_count_in_year
WHERE first_year = $year AND patent_count_in_year > 0
RETURN a.name AS assignee, first_year, patent_count_in_year
ORDER BY patent_count_in_year DESC, assignee
LIMIT 10

examples: Which companies were new entrants in 2024, meaning they disclosed BsAb patents for the first time that year?
In 2024, which assignees entered the BsAb patent space for the first time?
Which companies first appeared as BsAb patent filers in 2024?
